tasks.label: 🚀 Vibe Session Start
tasks.detail: 记录 session 开始时间，提醒执行开场 prompt

tasks.label: 📋 Show Project Status
tasks.command: echo '=== PROJECT STATUS ===' && cat PROJECT.md | head -40 && echo '' && echo '=== RECENT CHANGELOG ===' && grep -m 5 '## \[' CHANGELOG.md
tasks.detail: 快速查看项目状态和最近 changelog

tasks.label: 📝 New Changelog Entry
args:
const fs=require('fs');const d=new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0];const cl=fs.readFileSync('CHANGELOG.md','utf8');const sessions=cl.match(/Session #(\d+)/g)||[];const next=(sessions.length?Math.max(...sessions.map(s=>parseInt(s.match(/\d+/)[0])))+1:1);const entry=`
## [${d}] Session #${next} — [在此填写任务名]

**触发者**: Jianan
**AI 模型**: claude-sonnet-4-20250514
**任务类型**: Feature | Bugfix | Refactor | Config | Docs

### 变动摘要
- 

### 关键决策
- 

### 遗留问题
- [ ] 

---
`;const lines=cl.split('
');const insertAt=lines.findIndex(l=>l.startsWith('## ['));lines.splice(insertAt<0?3:insertAt,0,...entry.split('
'));fs.writeFileSync('CHANGELOG.md',lines.join('
'));console.log('✅ New changelog entry created: Session #'+next);
tasks.detail: 自动创建下一个 Session changelog 条目模板
